title: rosa × dumetorum subvar. hispidula
intro: Rosa × dumetorum subvar. hispidula, also known as the wild rose or prickly rose, is a subvariety of the Rosa dumetorum species, a type of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its high content of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum subvar. hispidula include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
